knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.subtitle: Drop your sources in. Search them yourself. Let your team cite them too.
knowledge.uploadHint: Click the "Upload" button in the top-right to add a document

toolbar.searchPlaceholderEmpty: Pick a KB to start searching
toolbar.ingestUrlTitle: Fetch a URL into the KB

dragOverlay.supportedFormats: Supports markdown / pdf / docx / html / txt / csv …

sidebar.emptyDesc: Create a KB and start collecting your notes, PDFs, and clipped pages.
sidebar.pickKbHint: Pick a knowledge base from the toolbar on the left
sidebar.startDesc: The setup wizard on the right takes two steps.

kb.demoModeDetail: Search only matches keywords — it doesn't understand synonyms or meaning.

tools.title: Let your team look things up
tools.body: On the Employees page, give a teammate the "<emp>KB Researcher</emp>" skill — they'll be able to search this KB in chat and answer with citations.

onboarding.heading: First time here · set up in 4 steps
onboarding.subtitle: Pull your scattered notes and docs together. Search them yourself. Let teammates cite them too.
onboarding.step1Desc: Add an OpenAI or Aliyun Bailian provider in Model Gateway so the KB can understand meaning. Without one, demo mode still gets you through the flow.
onboarding.step2Desc: Pick a name, choose an embedder, hit create. Then drop a few md / pdf / docx files in and start searching.
onboarding.step3Title: Upload or fetch a URL, then search or ask
onboarding.step3Desc: Top toolbar: file picker and URL fetch. You can also drag multiple files onto the page. Toggle the segmented control to "Ask" for RAG-style Q&A.
onboarding.step4Title: (Optional) Let your team look things up
onboarding.step4Desc: Add the "KB Researcher" skill to a teammate. They'll be able to search this KB from /chat and answer with citations.

docs.emptyDesc: Upload your first document (md, pdf, docx, html, txt). The agent parses, chunks, and embeds it within seconds.
docs.noFilterMatch: No documents match the current filter

search.loadingDesc: Matching keywords and semantics in parallel
search.noResults: No hits — try a more specific query, or tweak the BM25 / vector weights
search.emptyHint: Type to search inside {kb} · BM25 + vector retrieval run in parallel · expand a result to see why it ranks where it does
search.explainBoth: BM25 ranked it #{bm25} · vector ranked it #{vec} · hybrid fuses the better side
search.explainBm25Only: Lexical hit only (#{bm25}) · vector retriever did not surface this chunk
search.explainVecOnly: Semantic hit only (#{vec}) · keywords did not match

docTags.noSuggestions: AI returned nothing useful — chat provider may be unconfigured

stale.body: {missing}/{total} chunks have no vector (BM25 still works; vector recall will miss them)

overview.noDescription: (no description · click edit ↗ to add one)
overview.emptyDocs: No documents yet · upload one to start
overview.noStarters: Upload docs to get suggested starters · or chat provider not configured

starters.label: Try one of these
starters.hint: Generated from this KB's titles and headings · click to ask

ask.thinkingDesc: Retrieving snippets → assembling context → LLM reply
ask.followUpPlaceholder: Ask a follow-up · same citation numbers carry over…
ask.followUpHint: Press Enter to send · the same retrieved snippets are kept across turns
ask.copyAsCitationTitle: Copy markdown · question / answer / source list
ask.copyFailed: Copy failed · the browser may have blocked the clipboard API
ask.emptyDesc: AI answers from your KB content · each fact is tagged [N] with a clickable source
ask.placeholderFollowUp: Follow up · same citation numbers carry over…
ask.hint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline · same retrieved snippets carry across turns
ask.sourcesEmpty: Sources used in answers will appear here after you ask
ask.sourceColumnHelp: Aggregated sources across all turns · deduped · click to jump to source
ask.stopTitle: Abort generation · keep the partial answer
ask.regenerateTitle: Re-send the same question · fresh model sampling
ask.scrollToBottomTitle: Return to bottom · stay with the latest answer

bulkTags.title: Tag {count} selected documents
bulkTags.intro: Click an existing tag to cycle add → remove → unchanged. Add brand-new tags below (comma-separated).

create.title: New knowledge base
create.descriptionPlaceholder: What's in it · who reads it · any note that'll help future you
create.embeddingHelp: Grayed-out options need an API key — set one in .env to enable. Switching requires a reindex.

urlIngest.title: Fetch URL into "{kb}"
urlIngest.urlHint: v0 only handles server-rendered HTML pages — JS-only SPAs won't yield content
urlIngest.titlePlaceholder: Leave blank to auto-generate from the URL tail

advanced.intro:
You usually don't need to touch this. The two weights control whether keyword hits or semantic matches matter more;

top k caps how many snippets each query returns.

diagnose.queryPlaceholder: Type a query to compare the three retrieval modes…
diagnose.intro: Type a query: the left column shows keyword-only hits, the middle shows semantic-only hits, and the right shows the fused final ranking. Comparing where the same chunk lands across columns tells you whether BM25 or vector "gets" this query better.

basic.demoBody: Searching for "camera" won't match "camcorder". To understand synonyms you need to wire up a real embedding model.
basic.semanticBody: Searching for "camera" will match phrases like "camcorder" too.
basic.noModelsBody: Head to the <gateway>Model Gateway</gateway> and add an OpenAI or Aliyun Bailian provider with an API key — usable models will show up here.
basic.switchModelHint: Switching a KB's embedding model requires recomputing every "semantic fingerprint" (reindex). v0 doesn't hot-swap yet — to switch, delete this KB and recreate it with the new model.
basic.switchModelHintV2: Click any model to switch · the backend reindexes every chunk in this KB. Model is scoped per KB — switching A does not affect B.
basic.switchConfirm: Switching to {model} will reindex all {docs} documents in this KB. Proceed?
basic.switchSummary: Switched and re-embedded · {processed} processed · {succeeded} ok · {failed} failed

danger.heading: Delete knowledge base
danger.warning: Soft delete · recoverable by an admin within 30 days. After that, all documents and vectors are removed permanently. The raw uploaded files stay on disk under (data/kb/{prefix}…) and have to be cleaned up manually.
danger.confirmFieldLabel: Type the KB name "{name}" to confirm

detail.loadingChunksDesc: Reading each chunk's offsets, section, and page
detail.emptyChunks: This document has no chunks (parsed empty)
